name: Peppy Pizza Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain 8-oz can of mushroom stems and pieces.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
3. Mix the lean ground beef, pepperoni, bread crumbs, egg, oregano leaves, and salt in a bowl.
4. Spread the meat mixture evenly on the bottom and sides of an ungreased 10-inch pie pan.
5. Sprinkle mushrooms and olives over the meat layer.
6. Pour half of the tomato sauce over the vegetables.
7. Bake uncovered for 25 minutes. The pepperoni will give a red-flecked appearance to the meat.
8. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese over the top, then bake an additional 5 minutes.
9. Let cool for 5 minutes before cutting into 6 wedges.
If a 10-inch pie pan is not available, use a 9-inch one but place a pan underneath to catch any drips of juice. You may also substitute mushrooms with cut green beans or whole kernel corn if desired.
